specs.title: cp-000: Clicking outside the link popover closes it
cp-001: LinkPopover Edit link button switches the popover into inline edit mode
cp-002: Enter inside the link edit input confirms the updated URL
cp-003: Escape inside the link edit input exits edit mode without closing the popover
cp-004: Link edit input placeholder is https
cp-005: Link edit input auto-focuses and selects the full URL when edit mode opens
cp-006: LinkPopover Open in new tab uses windowopenurl _blank noopenernoreferrer
cp-007: LinkPopover Remove link unsets the current link mark and closes the popover
cp-008: scholarsyncopen-citation-dialog window event opens the citation dialog on editor
cp-009: Inserting citations through the editor route always inserts a citation node firs
cp-010: When no bibliography node exists the editor route appends one at the end of the
cp-011: Comment sidebar opens inline inside AcademicEditor only when commentSidebarOpen
cp-012: Comment sidebar header title is Comments
cp-013: Comment sidebar unresolved badge is hidden when there are zero unresolved thread
cp-014: Comment filter bar exposes exactly three modes all unresolved and resolved
cp-015: Active comment filter chip uses brand-colored styling while inactive chips use m
cp-016: Empty state headline is No comments yet
cp-017: Empty state helper text reads Select text and click the comment button to start
cp-018: Bottom new-comment input placeholder is Add a general comment about this documen
cp-019: Pressing Enter in the bottom new-comment input submits the comment when the fiel
cp-020: General document comments are stored without quoted text or selection ranges
cp-021: Inline-comment pending state shows a Commenting on selection banner before the n
cp-022: Inline-comment pending state shows the selected text in a truncated blockquote w
cp-023: Pending inline-comment Cancel clears pendingInlineComment closes the temporary c
cp-024: Pending inline-comment Add Comment button is disabled until the comment text has
cp-025: Reply input placeholder is Write a reply
cp-026: Reply button is disabled until reply text has non-whitespace content
cp-027: Pressing Enter in the reply input submits the reply when the field is non-empty
cp-028: Clicking a quoted-text chip in a comment thread restores the text selection in t
cp-029: Comment timestamps collapse to Just now Xm ago Xh ago Yesterday Xd ago or a loca
cp-030: Resolved top-level comments show a Resolved pill in the header row
cp-031: Resolved comments and replies render with reduced opacity and line-through text
cp-032: Only top-level comments render ResolveUnresolve and Reply actions
cp-033: Owner-authored comments render a Delete action aligned to the far right
cp-034: Resolving or unresolving a comment reloads the thread list from local storage im
